nasb.text: The sons of Dan said to him, “Do not let your voice be heard among us, or else fierce men will fall upon you and you will lose your life, with the lives of your household.”

esv.text: And the people of Dan said to him, “Do not let your voice be heard among us, lest angry fellows fall upon you, and you lose your life with the lives of your household.”

cnv.text: 但人對米迦說：“不要再讓我們聽見你的聲音，恐怕有暴躁的人攻擊你們，以致你和你全家盡都喪失性命。”

ccb.text: 但支派的人说：“别再多说了，不然我们当中性情暴躁的人会攻击你们，使你全家丧命。”
